name: Toss (Viva Republica)
description: Toss is a Korean financial super-app operated by Viva Republica that provides REST APIs for payments, banking, credit scoring, identity verification, and financial services across the Toss ecosystem, serving over 30 million registered users across South Korea.

itemListElement.name: Toss Payments API
itemListElement.description: REST API for processing payments, authorizations, cancellations, and refunds through the Toss Payments platform. Supports card, virtual account, mobile phone, bank transfer, and digital wallet payment methods.

itemListElement.name: Toss Pay API
itemListElement.description: Legacy REST API for Toss Pay payment transactions, merchant approval flows, refunds, and payment status checks.

itemListElement.name: Toss Payments Webhooks
itemListElement.description: Event-driven webhook system for receiving real-time notifications on payment status changes, virtual account deposits, cancellations, and marketplace payout results.

itemListElement.name: Toss Payments Payouts API
itemListElement.description: API for marketplace and platform operators to disburse funds to registered sellers, supporting seller registration, payout requests, and event-driven payout status updates.
